step_rationale: NOS substrate required for NO synthesis; low levels reflect endothelial dysfunction.
mechanism: L-arginine availability limits nitric oxide production, and its depletion associates with endothelial dysfunction and ACS severity.

references.title: The effect of melatonin on endothelial dysfunction in patients after acute coronary syndrome: The MEFACS randomized clinical trial.
Methylated arginines in stable and acute patients with coronary artery disease before and after percutaneous revascularization.
